_doc: Frozen Route-B3 (paired within-subject minimal-label certificate) manifest for the real-EEG validation (pre-reg v4). DRY-RUN package only. Method lock byte-unchanged from csc-b3-confirmatory-v1 / 0595f64.

code_provenance.expected_tag_ref: PLACEHOLDER refs/tags/csc-realeeg-v1 (tag NOT created in this dry-run package)
code_provenance.method_lock_note: byte-unchanged from the synthetic B3 confirmatory (0595f64); only Z (real features) is new; the runner verifies these hashes before any execute.

method_lock.note: no parameter change for real EEG; feature Z is the 16-dim SM16_no_FCz log-bandpower from the cache manifest

statistics.denominator_rule: false-confirmation rate over VALID cohorts only; INVALID_PAIR_STRUCTURE / NEED_MORE_LABELS / UNIDENTIFIABLE reported SEPARATELY and never pad the type-I denominator; above the invalid cap the cohort family is NON-ESTIMABLE (INCONCLUSIVE), not PASS.

endpoints.R1_type_I_gating: on NULL_cov: subject-clustered bootstrap (B_subject=2000) upper bound on false-confirmation rate <= family 0.05; per-cohort decision at alpha_budget=0.025
endpoints.R1b_gating_controls: NULL_label and NULL_cov_plus_label also <= 0.05 (label-shift trap controls)
endpoints.R2_power_reported_not_gating: on POS_concept / POS_concept_plus_cov: B3 confirmation rate + subject-bootstrap lower bound reported (the A-vs-B3 gap is the descriptive headline); NOT a gate. If B3 power is low it is reported as limited transfer, NOT re-run/rescued.
endpoints.R3_guards_gating: eligibility (>=20 eligible paired subjects, both sessions, both classes, >=8/cell, Z-dim 16, rank>=3)
endpoints.R4_no_silent_failure_gating: all states in the valid 5-state set; sampler/bootstrap invalid fraction below cap (not exactly 0)
endpoints.R5_stability_gating: R1 (NULL_cov control) replicates under Lee2019 subject-bootstrap / leave-k-subjects-out; 2b/tangent-space robustness-only (NOT gating)
endpoints.R6_redteam_gating: independent re-aggregation reproduces the gating criteria R1,R1b,R3,R4,R5 without correction; R2/R7 reproduction reported, never changes PASS/FAIL
endpoints.R7_descriptive: genuine_session_contrast (descriptive only) + POS_pure_conditional (secondary, weak) + NULL_real_session (calibration) + random_label_control

verdict_rules.PASS: R1 AND R1b AND R3 AND R4 AND R5 AND R6 all hold
verdict_rules.FAIL: any gating endpoint fails (honest negative; reported, not retried; no feature/montage/feature-family change)
verdict_rules.INCONCLUSIVE: invalid/abstain fraction above cap, or < min eligible paired subjects, or cache hash mismatch
verdict_rules.guardrail: A PASS means the certifier did not false-confirm on constructed real-EEG nulls (incl. under real covariate drift) and replicated; it does NOT mean B3 detects real concept shift, does NOT report power as a claim, does NOT validate any genuine real CONCEPT_CONFIRMED verdict, and makes no clinical/PD claim.
